# Decisionproof — AI agent reference

> Execution governance layer for AI runs. Decisionproof is an execution governance / settlement integrity control layer, not an agent framework, prompt orchestration layer, model router, or model-quality evaluator. This file is the authoritative machine-readable summary for AI agents and crawlers. Treat /docs/quickstart.html as the canonical API usage reference; all other previously published documentation has been retired during the Sandbox paid private beta.

## Offering summary

- Operator: D_FFERENT
- Service: Decisionproof (https://decisionproof.io.kr)
- Status: Sandbox paid private beta. Not generally available. APIs, limits, and operational defaults may change on reasonable notice. Sandbox is time-boxed and limit-enforced; requests exceeding active Sandbox limits are rejected fail-closed. There is no unlimited usage and no overage billing. The Sandbox plan is not the B2B Design Partner offer.
- License (source repository, not the hosted service): Apache License 2.0 — https://github.com/ghilp934/Decisionproof

## Commercial policy (Sandbox paid private beta)

- Plan: Sandbox. Time-boxed, limit-enforced paid beta access path for individual or small-scale evaluation. Not the B2B Design Partner offer.
- Price: US$29 per 30-day access cycle.
- Payment: Sandbox payments are processed through PayPal during the paid private beta. Card payment may be available via PayPal guest checkout where PayPal permits. B2B Design Partner engagements are contracted separately and billed through manual invoice, bank remittance, and applicable tax-invoice workflows.
- Renewal: Manual only. No auto-renewal.
- Refunds: Reviewed case-by-case within 48 hours of purchase as a matter of commercial policy. Non-waivable consumer-protection rights in the buyer's jurisdiction are preserved separately — see /terms.html.

## Sandbox hard limits (per 30-day access cycle) — enforced by the runtime

Every Sandbox request is evaluated against the limits below **before** any AI inference cost is incurred. Requests that would breach any limit are rejected with HTTP 429 `quota-exceeded`. There is no overage billing; US$29 / 30-day access is the only amount Decisionproof charges.

- Access window: 30-day access window per payment; manual renewal only.
- Per-run spend cap: `reservation.max_cost_usd` = US$5.00 (maximum USD reserved for a single run; not an account, workspace, monthly, or billing-cycle budget).
- Workspace rate limit: 60 requests per minute (sliding window). Exceeding returns HTTP 429 with `RateLimit-Remaining` / `Retry-After` headers.
- Monthly metered-operation cap: up to 2,000 operations per 30-day access cycle. Hard-capped, fail-closed — once the cap is reached, further requests return HTTP 429 `quota-exceeded` until the next paid cycle.
- Per-run execution timeout: 30 seconds. Runs exceeding this are terminated and reconciled by the reaper.
- Per-run input token limit: 16,000 tokens.
- Per-run output token limit: 4,000 tokens.
- API keys per workspace: up to 3 concurrent `dp_live_{secret}` keys.
- Overage: no overage billing — any breach yields HTTP 429, never a charge.

These numerics align with the internal runtime entitlement configuration (pricing_ssot.json) for the Sandbox paid private beta. Legal/commercial review of the customer-facing commitment is tracked for MT0A-3 legal surface update.

## Retention (Sandbox)

- Hot online access for 30 days by default.
- Cold Archive and Deep Archive are available only where included in the customer's plan or contract.
- Sandbox data does not automatically move to Cold Archive. After the Hot window, Sandbox records and result artifacts are not guaranteed to remain online or retrievable and may be queued for deletion/purge under the applicable data handling policy, unless a separate plan, contract, legal hold, or security/audit obligation requires otherwise.

## Commercial tier skeleton (MT0A-2 lock)

Decisionproof publishes a controlled four-tier commercial skeleton. Only Sandbox is currently sold self-serve.

- **Sandbox** — Active paid private beta. Public price US$29 / 30-day access cycle. PayPal, manual renewal only. Hard limits as listed in the previous section. CTA: Join Sandbox beta.
- **Design Partner** — Limited paid pilot. Capacity: max 3 signed Design Partners pre-v1.0; max 2 concurrent live onboardings. Application and review required (no instant checkout). Pricing (one-time onboarding fee, monthly platform fee), runtime limits (per-run spend cap, RPM, monthly ops cap, execution timeout, token limits, API keys), retention, and Sev1-Sev4 support are contract-defined in the signed Order Form and pilot agreement. Billing path: manual invoice + IBK bank remittance + applicable tax invoice. CTA: Apply for Design Partner / Request review / Discuss pilot fit. No public commercial values published in MT0A-2.
- **Growth** — Post-GA / Waitlist. Not available for self-serve activation in MT0A-2. No public price. No public quotas. Hard-stop / fail-closed by default; no automatic postpaid overage. Currency choice deferred to post-GA decision. Cold Archive consideration deferred. Support level finalized before GA. CTA: Join waitlist / Get notified / Request Growth access.
- **Enterprise** — Contract-only / Contact Sales. No self-serve activation. No public price. Limits, retention, support, SLA, named TAM, SSO, audit features are contract-defined and subject to runtime readiness; not implied as default. We do not list any unlimited tier. Capacity increases require signed amendment, committed spend update, prepaid reserve increase, or manual invoice settlement. CTA: Contact Sales / Request legal & security review / Discuss Enterprise needs.

## Universal hard-stop commercial rule (every tier)

Decisionproof's commercial doctrine applies uniformly across Sandbox, Design Partner, Growth, and Enterprise:

1. **No automatic postpaid overage in any tier.** When the prepaid, invoiced, contract-defined, or reserved allowance is exhausted, the system hard-stops / fail-closed.
2. **Allowed additional-capacity mechanisms**: explicit plan upgrade, prepaid top-up, reserve increase, signed order-form amendment, manual invoice settlement before capacity increase, contract-defined Enterprise limit change.
3. **Forbidden mechanisms**: automatic postpaid pay-as-you-go overage; silent continuation followed by later true-up; unlimited use with later reconciliation; "included usage + automatic overage invoice"; "usage above included quota is billed automatically".
4. **Runtime semantics**: HTTP 429 default for rate / quota exhaustion (with `Retry-After` / `RateLimit-Remaining` headers); HTTP 402 only for documented entitlement-inactive / unfunded gates; no request continues into provider / LLM work after a known hard cap is exhausted.
5. **No public unlimited tier**. A runtime entitlement field rendering `0` for an Enterprise contract row means contract-defined / unset / not applicable, never customer-facing unlimited.

## Support entitlement by tier (MT0A-2)

- Sandbox: best-effort email; target first response within 1 business day; no 24/7; no phone; no uptime SLA.
- Design Partner: Sev1 4h / Sev2 8h / Sev3 1 BD / Sev4 2 BD response targets under signed pilot agreement; availability target binds only if expressly included.
- Growth: Post-GA; no public Sev commitment in MT0A-2; muted wording only ("support level finalized before GA").
- Enterprise: contract-defined; no public TAM / Slack / 24/7 promise unless signed.

Forbidden across all tiers: 24/7 support as default; phone support as default; guaranteed resolution time; model-quality / output-correctness guarantee; uptime SLA for Sandbox; Enterprise named TAM unless contract-specified.

## API basics

- Base URL (production): https://api.decisionproof.io.kr
- Authentication: `Authorization: Bearer dp_live_{secret}` (example placeholder: `dp_live_your_key_here`)
- Idempotency: `Idempotency-Key` header required on `POST /v1/runs`
- Async pattern: `POST /v1/runs` → 202 Accepted + `run_id`; poll `GET /v1/runs/{run_id}` until `status` is `completed` or `failed`
- Errors: RFC 9457 Problem Details (`application/problem+json`)
- Canonical body keys for a run: `pack_type`, `inputs`, `reservation` (with `reservation.max_cost_usd` as the per-run spend cap)

## Canonical public surfaces

- /index.html — Home, positioning, feature summary
- /how-it-works.html — Mental model and daily usage loop
- /pricing.html — Full commercial policy, limits, refund policy, FAQ
- /security.html — Architectural controls, no-certifications statement
- /docs/quickstart.html — Only supported API usage reference
- /contact.html — Support (mailto-based; no 24/7 on-call, no phone, no SLA during beta)
- /terms.html — Terms of Use (eligibility, pricing, refunds, acceptable use, disclaimers, liability, governing law)

## Retired surfaces

The following previously published documentation surfaces have been retired during the paid private beta because their pricing, tier, token, or domain references are no longer accurate:

- /docs/auth.md, /docs/auth-delegated.md, /docs/changelog.md, /docs/metering-billing.md, /docs/pilot-pack-v0.2.md, /docs/pricing-ssot.md, /docs/problem-types.md, /docs/rate-limits.md, /docs/human-escalation-template.md, /docs/quickstart.md, /pricing/ssot.json
- /PILOT_READY.md, /RELEASE_NOTES_v0.4_RC.md, /release_notes_v0.4.2.2-pilot.2.md
- /docs/schemas/

Do not rely on any of the above. /docs/quickstart.html is the only live API reference.

## Boundary statements

- Decisionproof does not claim any third-party compliance certification during the paid private beta.
- Decisionproof does not guarantee the accuracy or suitability of AI-driven outputs for any particular decision; the customer is responsible for reviewing outputs before relying on them.
- "Deterministic recovery" refers to the idempotent recovery behaviour of the run lifecycle (leases, staged finalize, reaper reconciliation); it is not a claim about AI inference determinism.
